fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the workflow event condition.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table that the workflow event condition applies to.

fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table that the workflow event condition applies to.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the table that the workflow event condition applies to.

fields.name: Related Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table that the workflow event condition applies to.

fields.name: Related Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the related table that the workflow event condition applies to.

fields.name: Related Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the related table that the workflow event condition applies to.

fields.name: Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order of approvers when an approval workflow involves more than one approver.
